name: marketing-mastery
description: A professional 18-skill marketing suite covering B2B/industrial marketing, innovation diffusion and adoption, and digital-era business models (SaaS, HaaS, on-premise, cloud, APIs), plus cross-cutting strategy (SWOT/TOWS, Porter, STP, value proposition), the marketing mix (pricing, distribution, communication), metrics/KPIs, acquisition/retention, circular-economy marketing, and an integrating marketing-plan builder. Start with brand-lifecycle-diagnostic to route by the brand's life stage.
